betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Semiconductor Engineering: Silicon Boule Growth§f

§aSilicon Boules are the raw crystalline ingots from which wafers are sliced.§f
The §bSilicon Boule§f (`qmd:semiconductor:2`) is the first physical form of doped silicon in QMD. A boule is a long cylindrical single-crystal ingot grown in an §bNC Manufactory§f using liquid silicon and a small amount of dopant. Boules are §csliced§f into §bSilicon Wafers§f before further processing.

§6Boule Growth (QMDRecipes.java:341)§f:
Per `NCRecipes.manufactory.addRecipe("bouleSilicon", ...)`:
- Input: §bsilicon ore dust/ingot§f (`oreStack("waferSilicon", 4)`)
- Output: §bSilicon Boule§f (`qmd:semiconductor:2`, 1 unit)
- Process: §bNC Manufactory§f

§6Wafer Slicing (graph: nuclearcraft_manufactory)§f:
- Input 1: §bSilicon Boule§f (`qmd:semiconductor:2`, 1 unit)
- Input 2: §bBoule Slicing Wire§f (`libvulpes:productboule:3`, 1 unit) from the NC §bManufactory§f
- Output: §bSilicon Wafer§f (`qmd:semiconductor:3`, 1 unit)

§6Downstream Wafer Uses§f:
The Silicon Wafer produced from a Boule has §cno§f electrical doping yet — it is the "blank" intermediate used for:
- §bN-Type Doping§f: place a wafer in a §bFission Irradiator§f to produce §bN-Type Doped Silicon§f (`qmd:semiconductor:1`, recipe `waferSilicon → siliconNDoped`)
- §bP-Type Doping§f: bombard a wafer with §bBoron-11 ions§f inside a §bTarget Chamber§f to produce §bP-Type Doped Silicon§f (`qmd:semiconductor:0`)
- §bDirect Consumption§f: a few QMD chamber recipes take raw Silicon Wafers as item inputs (see `TargetChamberRecipes.java`)

§6Why Boules Matter§f:
- A single Boule produces a single Wafer per craft — bulk production is required to feed the §bFission Irradiator§f and §bTarget Chamber§f pipelines.
- The §bN-Type Doped Silicon§f is consumed by every §bBasic Processor§f recipe, so wafer supply is the rate-limit on Basic Processor throughput.
- The §bP-Type Doped Silicon§f is consumed by every §bAdvanced Processor§f recipe, gating ring-accelerator controllers behind Boron-11 beam production.

§eTip§f: Build multiple §bNC Manufactories§f in parallel and pipe liquid silicon to them from a §bChemical Reactor§f / §bFurnace§f line. The Manufactory is the bottleneck for both wafer slicing and boule growth — automate it before you commit to scaling up the §bFission Reactor§f.
